fields.description:
# Stage-2 bounded LLM pairwise overlap judge (advisory findings + suggested link commands)

## Why
Precision lives in stage 2, not in any similarity threshold. A bounded LLM pairwise judge over the ~K stage-1 candidates decides duplicate vs depends-on vs related-but-distinct vs unrelated â€” with the FP controls the research converged on.

## What
- A pairwise judge over each stage-1 `OverlapCandidate`. Output schema `overlap_verdict` (register in `contracts.py`): `{relation: enum, shared_artifact: string|null, confidence: number, abstain: bool}` where `relation âˆˆ {duplicates, supersedes, depends_on, related_distinct, unrelated}` â€” a CLOSED enum. Only `duplicates|supersedes|depends_on` are surfaceable; `related_distinct|unrelated` are terminal non-surfaced. (The `rebar link` relation set is the 6 built-ins â€” `blocks, depends_on, relates_to, duplicates, supersedes, discovered_from`; the judge only ever suggests the three listed.)
- Both orderings (Aâ†’B, Bâ†’A) are run; AGGREGATION RULE: surface a relation ONLY if BOTH orderings agree on the SAME surfaceable relation AND each cites a non-null `shared_artifact` AND both `confidence >= CONF_THRESHOLD`; otherwise downgrade to `related_distinct` (not surfaced). This makes position-bias disagreement fail safe toward "distinct."
- `abstain`/low-confidence pairs are dropped (not surfaced) and do NOT consume a surface slot.
- K (candidate count, default 20 from S5) â†’ 2K judge calls/query (both orderings); this is flat in corpus size. Optional cascade: a cheap single-ordering pre-pass drops obvious `unrelated` before the 2-ordering confirm, to cut calls.
- Surface at most `SURFACE_CAP` (default 3, configurable) highest-confidence results, each a finding `{counterpart_id, relation, shared_artifact, confidence, link_command}` where `link_command = "rebar link <query> <counterpart> <relation>"`.
- Error handling: an LLM timeout/error/malformed-output on a candidate â†’ that candidate is treated as `abstain` (dropped), logged; the judge never raises to the caller.

## Dependencies
S5 (`OverlapCandidate` interface + the query/corpus digests). Consumed by S7.

## Scope
- New `src/rebar/llm/overlap/judge.py` + rubric prompt `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/overlap_judge.md` (`execution_mode: single_turn`, `outputs: overlap_verdict`, `category`) whose body MUST encode: the 4-way classification, the require-a-cited-shared-artifact gate, the both-orderings instruction, and the abstain-when-unsure criterion; `overlap_verdict` schema + `contracts.py` registration; `CONF_THRESHOLD`, `SURFACE_CAP` in `overlap` config.
- OUT: retrieval (S5), wiring (S7).

## Testing
- Unit `tests/unit/test_overlap_judge.py` (FakeRunner): both-orderings-agree â†’ surfaced; orderings-disagree â†’ downgraded; missing `shared_artifact` â†’ not surfaced; abstain dropped, no slot consumed; â‰¤SURFACE_CAP; link_command well-formed with a valid relation; LLM error â†’ abstain (no raise).
- Eval `.rebar/evals/overlap_judge.eval.yaml`: a LABELED fixture (â‰¥12 pairs at `tests/fixtures/overlap_pairs/`, format documented) with BOTH a precision floor (â‰¥0.8) AND a recall floor (â‰¥0.6) on the fixture â€” the recall floor prevents an abstain-everything judge from trivially passing precision.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Judges each candidate in both orderings and aggregates by the stated rule (both agree + cite artifact + â‰¥CONF_THRESHOLD, else downgrade); verified by `pytest tests/unit/test_overlap_judge.py::{test_agree,test_disagree_downgrade}`.
- [ ] A finding is surfaced only with a non-null `shared_artifact`; absent one â†’ `related_distinct`, not surfaced; verified by `::test_requires_artifact`.
- [ ] â‰¤`SURFACE_CAP` (default 3) findings surface, each with `{counterpart_id, relationâˆˆ{duplicates,supersedes,depends_on}, shared_artifact, confidence, link_command}`; `link_command` is a valid `rebar link` invocation.
- [ ] Abstain/low-confidence pairs are dropped without consuming a slot; an LLM error on a candidate â†’ abstain, logged, no raise.
- [ ] Eval fixture (â‰¥12 labeled pairs) gives precision â‰¥0.8 AND recall â‰¥0.6; a related-but-distinct pair is NOT flagged and a genuine duplicate IS; `CONF_THRESHOLD`/K/`SURFACE_CAP` are configurable.
